node.title: Uber Amsterdam post virtual onsite team matching

topic.title: Uber Amsterdam post virtual onsite team matching

post.content: Hello. Are there any Uber Amsterdam employee in this group? I\'m a software engineer and had an interview with Uber. I was told that I passed the virtual onsite interview for an L4 software engineer role in early July and entering team matching stage. However there has been no update since then and the recruiters are ghosting me. Is there anyone working for Uber at Amsterdam who might know some insights? Thanks!
Ask under the question section and not in the interview experience section. Please post your interview experience here.
Hey hi, if possible could you message me on linkedin \n
